scripts.audit:hono: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat tests/compat/hono/smoke.ts --alias hono/tiny=vendor/hono/src/preset/tiny.ts
scripts.audit:hono-basic: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat tests/compat/hono/basic-smoke.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts
scripts.audit:hono-jsx-ssr: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js --audit-compat vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts
scripts.build:hono-basic-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build vendor/hono-examples/basic/src/index.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/basic-auth=vendor/hono/src/middleware/basic-auth/index.ts --alias hono/etag=vendor/hono/src/middleware/etag/index.ts --alias hono/powered-by=vendor/hono/src/middleware/powered-by/index.ts --alias hono/pretty-json=vendor/hono/src/middleware/pretty-json/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/basic-auth=tests/compat/hono/basic-auth-api.d.ts --api hono/etag=tests/compat/hono/etag-api.d.ts --api hono/powered-by=tests/compat/hono/powered-by-api.d.ts --api hono/pretty-json=tests/compat/hono/pretty-json-api.d.ts --output dist/hono-basic-example
scripts.build:hono-jsx-ssr-example: npm run build:frontend && cargo run -q -p tinytsx -- build vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/html=tests/compat/hono/html-api.d.ts --output dist/hono-jsx-ssr-example
scripts.try:compile:hono: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js tests/compat/hono/smoke.ts --alias hono/tiny=vendor/hono/src/preset/tiny.ts --api hono/tiny=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts
scripts.try:compile:hono-basic: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js tests/compat/hono/basic-smoke.ts --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts
scripts.try:compile:hono-jsx-ssr: npm run build:frontend && node frontend/dist/src/cli.js vendor/hono-examples/jsx-ssr/src/index.tsx --alias hono=vendor/hono/src/index.ts --alias hono/html=vendor/hono/src/helper/html/index.ts --api hono=tests/compat/hono/api.d.ts --api hono/html=tests/compat/hono/html-api.d.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:hono-intake && npm run test:hono-jsx-reference && npm run test:test262-intake && npm run test:test262-native && npm run test:wpt-intake && npm run test:wpt-native && npm run test:benchmarks && cargo test --workspace
